item.title: Bruun, Kie, Strunk, Buchholtz, Ahlmann, Hansen
item.body: A new group of completed works has been added to Kalliope: Malthe Conrad Bruun's Kritiske Randgloser til Nytaarsgave for Damer (1794), Olaf Hansen's Tre Folkeviser (1899), Alfred Kie's Floden (1921), Johannes Buchholtz's Ravne og Duer (1921), Aage Strunk's Slagger og Gløder (1922), and Hans Ahlmann's Morgenstjernen (1924).

item.title: Hoffmann, Rørdam, Walleen, Sick, Agerskov
item.body: Michael Agerskov's Tusmørkets Stemmer (1899) has been contributed by Pernille and Morten Barfoed. In addition, Kai Hoffmann's Sværdtid er endt (1920), Valdemar Rørdam's Afrodites Boldspil (1920), Alphonse Walleen's Digte (1894), and Ingeborg Maria Sick's Ond Lykke (1921) have been added.

item.title: Holstein, Bønnelycke, Hoffmann, Agerskov
item.body: Pernille and Morten Barfoed have contributed Michael Agerskov's To Mennesker og Skumring (1893). P. L. Møller's Gudrun (1872), Inge Nalbandiàn's Dønninger (1919), Emil Bønnelycke's Gadens Legende (1920) and Guldæblerne (1921), Kai Hoffmann's Den vide Verden (1921), Christian Rimestad's Kærlighedsdigte (1920), and Ludvig Holstein's Hymner og Viser (1922) have also been placed on the shelves.

item.title: Ingeborg Maria Sick
item.body: Ingeborg Maria Sick, with Bølgeslag (1904), and Sille Beyer, with a couple of translations from Vintergrønt (1852), are new poets on Kalliope. In addition, Hans Ahlmann's Aftenlandet (1913), Genlyd af Dagene (1918), and Foraar i Danmark (1920) have been added for happy reading in the approaching spring.

item.title: Emil Bønnelycke
item.body: Emil Bønnelycke stepped off his last tram in 1953, so after 70 years Kalliope can now delight readers with his commutes in Ild og Ungdom (1917), Festerne (1918), Asfaltens Sange (1918), Taarer (1918), and Buer og Staal (1919).

item.title: Ahlmann and Juel
item.body: Hans Ahlmann's Ungdoms Legende (1907) and Poplerne (1910) have been added with help from Peder Henriksen. Axel Juel's Himmel og Hav (1916) and Otto Fønns's Tidløs (1919) can now also be read wherever old poems are read.
The English version of Kalliope released today. Hvis du ser denne engelske side og ønsker den danske, skal du klikke for flaget nederst på siden.
